description: Unhandled promise rejection in async email service that can crash the server

expected_issues.description: sendWelcomeEmail function does not handle errors from emailClient.send(). If email sending fails, the promise rejection is unhandled and can crash the Node.js process.
expected_issues.impact: Server crash on email service failure, poor user experience, no error logging
expected_issues.cwe: CWE-755: Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions

expected_issues.description: notifyUserAsync calls sendNotification without awaiting or catching errors. Errors are silently swallowed or cause unhandled rejections.
expected_issues.impact: Silent failures, no error visibility, potential process crashes

expected_tests.description: sendWelcomeEmail should handle email service failures gracefully
sendWelcomeEmail should return success when email sends
notifyUserAsync should not crash on email failure
